option.name: originalContent
option.value:
package models
type MusicStats struct { TrackId int `json:"track_id"` UserId int `json:"user_id"` IsFavorite bool `json:"is_favorite"` PlayCount int `json:"play_count"` LastPlayedAt string `json:"last_played_at"` }

option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
